faqs.question: How much does silverfish control cost in East Tremont?
faqs.answer: Our silverfish control services in East Tremont range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property and severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any treatment, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Why do I have silverfish in my East Tremont apartment?
faqs.answer: Silverfish are attracted to moisture and starch-based materials commonly found in East Tremont's older buildings. Leaky pipes, humid bathrooms, damp basements, and stored paper products create perfect conditions for these pests. Our treatment addresses both the infestation and the environmental factors that attract them.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout East Tremont and the surrounding Bronx neighborhoods. Most silverfish treatments are completed in a single visit, with noticeable reduction in activity within 24-48 hours and complete elimination within 1-2 weeks.

faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are highly effective against silverfish but safe for your family and pets when applied by our certified technicians.
